final-capstone-file-room-handoff.label: Final Capstone: Community Media Archive
final-capstone-file-room-handoff.summary: Organize and verify a community media archive with the full beginner terminal toolkit.

sketch0.title: A media archive ready for the next team

final-capstone-file-room-handoff-termina.title: Inspect and build the archive structure
final-capstone-file-room-handoff-termina.prompt: Inspect `media-archive`, enter it, and create `organized/photos`, `organized/documents`, `backup`, and `review`. Create the empty review marker `review/needs-review.txt`.
final-capstone-file-room-handoff-termina.hint: Keep every earlier result, then make the one focused archive change required by this step.

help.concept: The media-archive capstone combines inspection, creation, writing, moving, renaming, copying, safe deletion, and final verification.
help.hint_1: Keep every earlier result, then make the one focused archive change required by this step.
help.hint_2: Use targeted `ls`, `cat`, and `wc -l` checks so the final READY marker is supported by evidence.

final-capstone-file-room-handoff-termina.starterCode: # Step 1: inspect media-archive, enter it, create the archive folders, and add review/needs-review.txt.

0.message: Use `pwd` to confirm where you are.

2.message: Create the handoff folders with `mkdir` or `mkdir -p`.

0.message: Do not use sudo in this beginner workspace.

1.message: Do not use recursive rm in this course.

2.message: Permissions commands are not needed for this workspace.

3.message: Do not download anything for this exercise.

final-capstone-file-room-handoff-termina.title: Write the archive guide and review note
final-capstone-file-room-handoff-termina.prompt: In `media-archive`, write `organized/README.txt` with the three required guide lines and write `Check image names before publishing` into `review/needs-review.txt`. Use `>` for the first README line and `>>` for the next two lines.
final-capstone-file-room-handoff-termina.hint: Keep every earlier result, then make the one focused archive change required by this step.

help.concept: The media-archive capstone combines inspection, creation, writing, moving, renaming, copying, safe deletion, and final verification.
help.hint_1: Keep every earlier result, then make the one focused archive change required by this step.
help.hint_2: Use targeted `ls`, `cat`, and `wc -l` checks so the final READY marker is supported by evidence.

final-capstone-file-room-handoff-termina.starterCode: # Step 2: write organized/README.txt and review/needs-review.txt, then read both files.

0.message: Write the first README line with `>`.

1.message: Append the second README line with `>>`.

0.message: Do not use sudo in this beginner workspace.

1.message: Do not use recursive rm in this course.

2.message: Permissions commands are not needed for this workspace.

3.message: Do not download anything for this exercise.

final-capstone-file-room-handoff-termina.title: Move and rename the incoming records
final-capstone-file-room-handoff-termina.prompt: Move `inbox/photo-index.txt` to `organized/photos/index.txt`, move `inbox/release-forms.txt` to `organized/documents/release-forms.txt`, and move `inbox/shoot-notes.txt` to `review/shoot-notes.txt`. Verify the old and new locations.
final-capstone-file-room-handoff-termina.hint: Keep every earlier result, then make the one focused archive change required by this step.

0.message: Use `mv` to move the inbox files.
Do not use sudo in this beginner workspace.

1.message: Do not use recursive rm in this course.

2.message: Permissions commands are not needed for this workspace.

final-capstone-file-room-handoff-termina.title: Back up the index and remove the temporary import
final-capstone-file-room-handoff-termina.prompt: Copy `organized/photos/index.txt` to `backup/photo-index-backup.txt`. Then remove only `inbox/tmp-import.txt` and verify that the backup exists and the temporary file is gone.
final-capstone-file-room-handoff-termina.hint: Keep every earlier result, then make the one focused archive change required by this step.

1.message: Remove only the temporary scratch file.

0.message: Do not use sudo in this beginner workspace.

1.message: Do not use recursive rm in this course.

final-capstone-file-room-handoff-termina.title: Verify the archive and mark it ready
final-capstone-file-room-handoff-termina.prompt: Run a final verification with `pwd`, targeted `ls`, `cat organized/README.txt`, and `wc -l organized/photos/index.txt`. Then write `Media archive verified` to `organized/READY.txt` and display the marker.

1.message: Append the final README line with `>>`.

capstone-synopsis.title: Community file room handoff
capstone-synopsis.bodyMarkdown:
A neighborhood media team has inherited a small archive after a community photo project. The incoming files are all in one inbox: a photo index, release forms, shoot notes, and one temporary import file. Your job is to turn that inbox into a verified archive another volunteer can understand without asking you what happened.

Across five cumulative steps, you will inspect the workspace, create an organized structure, write a README and review note, move and rename records, back up the photo index, remove the known temporary file, and perform a final verification with `pwd`, `ls`, `cat`, and `wc -l`.

This is not a larger copy of the notes project. It is a transfer task: you must choose the correct command for preservation, relocation, naming, cleanup, and evidence that the archive is ready.
